Class ProcessorInformation

java.lang.Object
oshi.driver.common.windows.perfmon.ProcessorInformation
@ThreadSafe public final class ProcessorInformation extends Object
Processor performance counter enums

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    ProcessorInformation.InterruptsProperty
    System interrupts counters
    static enum 
    ProcessorInformation.ProcessorFrequencyProperty
    Processor Frequency counters.
    static enum 
    ProcessorInformation.ProcessorPerformanceProperty
    Processor Performance counters from the WMI Formatted Data table.
    static enum 
    ProcessorInformation.ProcessorTickCountProperty
    Processor performance counters
    static enum 
    ProcessorInformation.ProcessorUtilityTickCountProperty
    Processor performance counters including utility counters

    ProcessorInformation.SystemTickCountProperty
    System performance counters

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Pair<List<String>, Map<ProcessorInformation.ProcessorFrequencyProperty, List<Long>>>
    queryFrequencyCounters(PerfCounterQueryExecutor executor)
    Returns processor frequency counters.
    static Map<ProcessorInformation.InterruptsProperty, Long>
    queryInterruptCounters(PerfCounterQueryExecutor executor)
    Returns system interrupts counters.
    static Pair<List<String>, Map<ProcessorInformation.ProcessorUtilityTickCountProperty, List<Long>>>
    queryProcessorCapacityCounters(PerfCounterQueryExecutor executor)
    Returns processor capacity performance counters.
    static Pair<List<String>, Map<ProcessorInformation.ProcessorTickCountProperty, List<Long>>>
    queryProcessorCounters(PerfCounterQueryExecutor executor)
    Returns processor performance counters.
    static Pair<List<String>, Map<ProcessorInformation.ProcessorPerformanceProperty, List<Long>>>
    queryProcessorPerformanceCounters(PerfCounterQueryExecutor executor)
    Returns processor performance percentage (cooked) from the WMI Formatted Data table.
    static Map<ProcessorInformation.SystemTickCountProperty, Long>
    querySystemCounters(PerfCounterQueryExecutor executor)
    Returns system performance counters.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • queryProcessorCounters

      public static Pair<List<String>, Map<ProcessorInformation.ProcessorTickCountProperty, List<Long>>> queryProcessorCounters(PerfCounterQueryExecutor executor)
      Returns processor performance counters.
      Parameters:
      executor - the performance counter query executor
      Returns:
      Performance Counters for processors, or empty if OS counters are disabled.

    • querySystemCounters

      public static Map<ProcessorInformation.SystemTickCountProperty, Long> querySystemCounters(PerfCounterQueryExecutor executor)
      Returns system performance counters.
      Parameters:
      executor - the performance counter query executor
      Returns:
      Performance Counters for the total of all processors, or empty if OS counters are disabled.

    • queryProcessorCapacityCounters

      public static Pair<List<String>, Map<ProcessorInformation.ProcessorUtilityTickCountProperty, List<Long>>> queryProcessorCapacityCounters(PerfCounterQueryExecutor executor)
      Returns processor capacity performance counters.
      Parameters:
      executor - the performance counter query executor
      Returns:
      Performance Counters for processor capacity, or empty if OS counters are disabled.

    • queryInterruptCounters

      public static Map<ProcessorInformation.InterruptsProperty, Long> queryInterruptCounters(PerfCounterQueryExecutor executor)
      Returns system interrupts counters.
      Parameters:
      executor - the performance counter query executor
      Returns:
      Interrupts counter for the total of all processors, or empty if OS counters are disabled.

    • queryFrequencyCounters

      public static Pair<List<String>, Map<ProcessorInformation.ProcessorFrequencyProperty, List<Long>>> queryFrequencyCounters(PerfCounterQueryExecutor executor)
      Returns processor frequency counters.
      Parameters:
      executor - the performance counter query executor
      Returns:
      Processor frequency counter for each processor, or empty if OS counters are disabled.

    • queryProcessorPerformanceCounters

      public static Pair<List<String>, Map<ProcessorInformation.ProcessorPerformanceProperty, List<Long>>> queryProcessorPerformanceCounters(PerfCounterQueryExecutor executor)
      Returns processor performance percentage (cooked) from the WMI Formatted Data table.
      Parameters:
      executor - the performance counter query executor
      Returns:
      Processor performance percentage for each processor, or empty if OS counters are disabled.
